caption: A man wearing a distinctive, tall, gray textured wig, glasses, and black over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a small red bow tie and tan suspenders. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous small framed photographs and clothing hanging on racks, including items with the brand "LEE" visible. On the left side of the scene, a logo reads "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST," while a similar logo appears on the right side as "BOSS TALK JOY." Across the sequence, the man remains seated, speaking and gesturing with his right hand, which rises to his chest before lowering again. His facial expressions shift slightly as he talks, while the camera angle and surrounding equipment remain static.
